summary.lv: Ubiquiti meklē Senior SRE/DevOps inženieri, kas administrēs AWS pakalpojumus (ECS, IAM, RDS, Lambda, API Gateway), automatizēs infrastruktūru un nodrošinās stabilu produktu darbību.
summary.en: Ubiquiti is hiring a Senior SRE/DevOps Engineer to administer AWS services (ECS, IAM, RDS, Lambda, API Gateway), automate infrastructure and keep products reliably online.
